name: ModelScope
description: Alibabas open model community (魔搭) similar to Hugging Face, hosting 5000+ Chinese and global AI models with API access.

seo.title: ModelScope — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: ModelScope: Alibabas open model community (魔搭) similar to Hugging Face, hosting 5000+ Chinese and global AI models with API access.

when_to_use: Discovering and downloading Chinese open-source AI models
Running model inference demos for text, image, and speech tasks
Contributing and sharing models in China's ML community hub
Accessing Alibaba-hosted models and datasets for training

pros: Huge catalog of Chinese and global AI models
Integrated API access to many models
cons: Model licenses and export rules vary
Less focus on non-Chinese community growth
review.verdict: The Hugging Face equivalent for the Chinese ecosystem; essential if that's your market.
review.best_for: Developers building AI products for Chinese users or on Alibaba Cloud
review.not_for: Global teams who can stay on Hugging Face with English-first docs
